text:
"Showdown" is a song from the film Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone. It is track 10 in the album Music from Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone. It is an arranged version of "Angel Attack". https://vgmdb.net/album/19692 

In the film, the song is featured during the battle between the Fifth Angel and Evangelion Unit-01, specifically as the Fifth Angel unleashes its tentacles, slicing Unit-01's umbilical cable and nearly defeating it.

Lyrics

 
Fight or die with truth and honour 

This is the final showdown 
This is the last horizon 
No second chance for losing 
There will be no tomorrow 

Tear the heart from your aggressor 

This is the final showdown 
With no more road to go down 
Prevail or pay the devil 
This is the end forever
